philosophy.title: Work Philosophy
philosophy.text: I believe in the power of technology to transform businesses and improve lives. My approach combines solid software engineering with AI innovation, always prioritizing code quality, user experience and real impact. I work with agile methodologies, focused on measurable results and long-term sustainable solutions.
